name: anaplan-mcp
description: Connect Claude to the Anaplan Integration API: manage workspaces, models, lists, modules, imports/exports, and processes.
long_description: Gives Claude direct access to the Anaplan Integration API v2. Supports OAuth2 (device grant), certificate, and basic authentication; bulk import/export/process orchestration; transactional cell reads/writes; and an optional Playwright-based UI automation fallback for operations the API blocks on some tenants (model mode changes, list/module creation).

anaplan_instance.title: Anaplan instance
anaplan_instance.description: Tenant region: us1 (default) or au1. Applies to every auth method.

anaplan_client_id.title: OAuth client ID
anaplan_client_id.description: Recommended auth method. Enables device-grant sign-in: Claude shows a link in chat, approve it in Anaplan, then retry. Leave blank if using username/password or certificate auth instead.

anaplan_username.title: Username (basic auth)
anaplan_username.description: Anaplan email. Only needed if not using OAuth or certificate auth.

anaplan_password.title: Password (basic auth)
anaplan_password.description: Anaplan password. Only needed if not using OAuth or certificate auth. Also used as the Playwright login password if UI automation is enabled below.

anaplan_certificate_path.title: Certificate path (cert auth)
anaplan_certificate_path.description: Path to a PEM certificate file. Only needed for certificate-based auth.

anaplan_private_key_path.title: Private key path (cert auth)
anaplan_private_key_path.description: Path to the PEM private key matching the certificate above. Only needed for certificate-based auth.

anaplan_playwright_enabled.title: Enable Playwright UI automation
anaplan_playwright_enabled.description: Turns on browser-automation fallback for set_modelmode, create_list, and create_module when the API returns 405 on your tenant. Requires 'npm install playwright && npx playwright install chromium' in the extension folder, and the username/password above.

anaplan_playwright_headless.title: Run Playwright headless
anaplan_playwright_headless.description: Uncheck to show the browser window, needed if your Anaplan login requires interactive MFA.
